Every Eli Manning TD Pass
  • Opponent
  • Season
  • Week
  • Distance
  • Search

Eli Manning has thrown 384 touchdown passes in his NFL career. Below you will find every single one of them, organized in different ways.

TDs by Opponent

TDs by Season

TDs by Week

Eli Manning has thrown 18 playoff TDs which is about 4.7 % of his total TDs.

TDs by Receiver

Eli Manning has connected with Odell Beckham for 44 touchdowns. He's also thrown TDs to 57 other players.

TDs by Distance

If you only count yards gained on passes that went for TDs, Eli Manning has accumulated 7,545 yards. That's more passing yards than Colt McCoy (7,195) threw in his entire career.
